policy.redactionRule: Store only counts, paths, line numbers, and SHA-256 digests; never store file contents or snippets. Restricted glob contents are not read or included.
policy.scanClassification: Snapshot, solver.patch, public_results.log, and trajectory output high-signal hits count as restricted-content/overlap findings. Trajectory prompt and meta high-signal terms are reported separately as guardrail policy mentions and excluded from overlap counts.

remainingBlockers: artifact-scope performance sampling is not a statistical benchmark
this audit is artifact-scope only and does not complete runtime workspace isolation or full DeepSWE
